name: pretty-pty
description: PTY-first runtime for Pretty. See README.md.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n prettyd,vite -c cyan,magenta "npm --prefix prettyd run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix prettyd run build
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix prettyd install && npm --prefix frontend install
